name: mpesa-mcp
description: MCP server for M-Pesa (Safaricom Daraja) and Africa's Talking APIs. Enables AI agents to trigger STK Push payments, query transaction status, send SMS to 20+ African telecom networks, and top up airtime.

tools.name: mpesa_stk_push
tools.description: Trigger an M-Pesa STK Push payment request to a customer phone number. Destructive — sends a real payment prompt.

tools.name: mpesa_stk_query
tools.description: Check the status of a pending M-Pesa STK Push transaction by CheckoutRequestID.

tools.name: mpesa_transaction_status
tools.description: Query the status of any M-Pesa transaction by TransactionID or receipt number.

tools.name: sms_send
tools.description: Send SMS via Africa's Talking to up to 1000 recipients across 20+ African telecom networks. Destructive — sends real messages.

tools.name: airtime_send
tools.description: Top up airtime for a mobile subscriber via Africa's Talking. Destructive — triggers real airtime transfer.

related.name: wapimaji-mcp
related.description: Kenya drought intelligence MCP server — NDMA data + SMS drought alerts via Africa's Talking

envVars.name: MPESA_CONSUMER_KEY
envVars.description: Safaricom Daraja API consumer key — from developer.safaricom.co.ke

envVars.name: MPESA_PASSKEY
envVars.description: Lipa na M-Pesa passkey from Daraja portal

envVars.name: SANDBOX
envVars.description: Set to 'true' for sandbox mode (no real money moved). Default: true
